title: matricaria multicaulis
intro: Matricaria multicaulis, also known as French chamomile, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is often used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, making it a natural remedy for soothing digestive issues and relieving anxiety. The health benefits of Matricaria multicaulis include reducing stress and promoting relaxation, as well as alleviating symptoms of insomnia and menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Matricaria multicaulis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed for its medicinal properties or used topically to soothe skin irritations.
